name: JMRI MCP
description: MCP server for JMRI - voice/chat control of DCC model railroads

inputs.title: JMRI Server URL
inputs.description: URL of your JMRI Web Server

inputs.title: Exhibition Mode Password
inputs.description: Password required to exit exhibition mode (a restricted, public-demo-safe mode). Leave blank to use the default password 'this is sparta'.

inputs.title: Exhibition Mode Allowed DCC Addresses
inputs.description: Comma-separated DCC addresses locomotives are restricted to while exhibition mode is on, e.g. '4,5,6'. Leave blank to allow any address.

inputs.title: Start Already in Exhibition Mode
inputs.description: If enabled, the server starts already in exhibition mode instead of requiring a spoken/typed command to enter it.
